label: South Quarry Hamlet

intent.role: A mining support hamlet that can hold ore storage, a foreman, and a few rough homes.
intent.differenceFromStarterTown: Blockier, sootier, and more work-yard shaped than the cozy timber houses around Starter Town.
intent.playerRead: A place to bank, meet mining NPCs, and understand that the mainland has resource settlements with their own visual language.

placements.role: ore storage and foreman work area

npcPlan.role: mining route intro and ore-sorting flavor
small settlement bank if the area graduates from draft

promotionChecklist: Preview stamp silhouettes and settlement placement first.
Check road and combat spawn overlap before touching main_overworld.json.
Promote buildings as shared stamps, not settlement-only one-offs.
Add NPC home tags only after the target structures exist in canonical world content.
